incident.message: Expecting `android:screenOrientation="unspecified"` or `"fullSensor"` for this activity so the user can use the application in any orientation and provide a great experience on Chrome OS devices

entry.name: message
entry.string: Attribute `elevation` is only used in API level 21 and higher (current min is %1$d)

incident.message: Consider replacing `android:layout_marginLeft` with `android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_10sdp"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:drawableLeft` with `android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_username"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:drawableLeft` with `android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_email"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:drawableLeft` with `android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_password"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:drawableLeft` with `android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_password"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:drawableLeft` with `android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_gender"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:drawableLeft` with `android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_imperial"` to better support right-to-left layouts
`android:editable` is deprecated: Use an `<EditText>` to make it editable
`android:editable` is deprecated: Use `inputType` instead
Consider replacing `android:drawableLeft` with `android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_dateofbirth"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:drawableLeft` with `android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_medication"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:drawableLeft` with `android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_heart"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:drawableLeft` with `android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_city"` to better support right-to-left layouts

entry.name: message
entry.string: Attribute `elevation` is only used in API level 21 and higher (current min is %1$d)

incident.message: When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry

entry.name: message
entry.string: Attribute `elevation` is only used in API level 21 and higher (current min is %1$d)

entry.name: message
entry.string: Attribute `elevation` is only used in API level 21 and higher (current min is %1$d)

incident.message: Consider replacing `android:layout_marginLeft` with `android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_10sdp"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Use "`start`" instead of "`left`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Consider replacing `android:layout_alignParentRight` with `android:layout_alignParentEnd="true"` to better support right-to-left layouts

entry.name: message
entry.string: Field requires API level 21 (current min is %1$s): `android.view.WindowManager.LayoutParams#FLAG_DRAWS_SYSTEM_BAR_BACKGROUNDS`

incident.message: The application should not provide its own launch screen
